chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 299 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 Mr. Fahad Pirzada, advocate. This reference application is pending since 2016 without any significant progress. Today, nine years later, learned counsel is present merely seeking time. Be that as it may, it appears that the Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone IV, Karachi is not interested in pursuing this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. Vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
